title: Scramjet booster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Booster}}
The '''scramjet booster''' was a propulsion device produced by [[Chab-Ylwoum]]. It was most notably used on the [[V-wing airspeeder]] deployed by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The boosters allowed the V-wing airspeeder to reach maximum speeds of up to 1400 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]], but only for a short period of time. It needed cooling down for reuse. Overuse of the booster could cause severe damage to the craft.

{{Tech-stub}}
